utility_evaluation.REASONING:

- travel_dates: Present as "June 16–20, 2024". Specific dates given. (2/7)
- transportation: Should include flight details with costs. Present as flights with carrier, departure/return times, and total_cost 480. However, lacks origin/destination airports, flight numbers, and per-ticket breakdown, but the format only requires "flight details with costs"; provided details and total cost suffice. Count as included. (3/7)
- accommodation: Should be hotel selection with costs. Present: hotel name, nights, cost per night, total_cost. Fully specified. (4/7)
- activities: Should be selected activities with costs. Present: only a generic description "Selected family-friendly activities" and a total_cost 200; does not list specific selected activities or individual costs. Not fully specified. (4/7)
- additional_services: Should be any extra services with costs. Present: dining package with daily_cost and total_cost; considered specified. (5/7)
- total_budget: Present as 1655 with an implied total, but no complete cost breakdown itemizing all components within total_budget section itself. However, costs for transportation, accommodation, activities, and additional services are provided above and sum to the total; many interpretations accept this as a complete breakdown across sections. The field itself is just a single number without line items, but since the earlier sections provide the breakdown, this is reasonably considered covered. Count as included. (6/7)
